---
title: "About"
---

I'm Nick. This is where I keep short writeups of things I'm building — usually
with AI in the loop — alongside loose thoughts and the occasional Kaggle
competition log.

Nothing here is polished. It's a working notebook: an entry exists because I
wanted to remember how something worked, or why it didn't.

- GitHub: [@nicholastacik](https://github.com/nicholastacik)
